product_results.title: Yawlsow 3 Pairs Slouchy Pilates Socks with Grips for Women Scrunch Yoga Grippy Non Slip Long Socks for Barre Workout

summary.text: Customers find these socks to be the best comfortable socks that won't strangle ankles. They describe the product as excellent with amazing quality. The socks look great in appearance. However, customers have mixed opinions regarding the grip and thickness of the socks.

authors_reviews.title: Nice pilates grip socks
authors_reviews.text: These are my go to socks for reformer pilates. They’ve washed well without losing their grip so far.
authors_reviews.author: Sarah H

authors_reviews.title: Good quality, great price and so cute
authors_reviews.text: I LOVE these socks. They are so cute with boots. I ordered more for when they wear out so I have them forever 😂 10/10 recommend
authors_reviews.author: Mackenzie Jessop

authors_reviews.title: Works as almost knee highs
authors_reviews.text: I needed socks that were knee high or close to to wear under my air cast boot, to give comfort. I didn’t want a tight sock but something to let the leg breathe yet cushion from the boot. This one is perfect - feels good, and has a grippy sole and a good price.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Cute socks.
authors_reviews.text: Wear these all the time! Super comfy and just the scrunchy style I was looking for. They are very durable. I get a lot of compliments on them.
authors_reviews.author: Samantha

authors_reviews.title: Comfy but not Pilates quality
authors_reviews.text: Bought these for Pilates. The grippy part of the sock works somewhat well, but I was adjusting them often to keep the grippy part on the bottom. They’re comfy for around th house, but I wouldn’t wear them for Pilates again.
authors_reviews.author: L. A. Schoenenberger

authors_reviews.title: Super comfortable - but could use a bit more support
authors_reviews.text: I do Pilates a few times a week at home on a mat. Even though I'm a guy I figured I could benefit from grippy socks like these. I've tried socks like these before, so I have a frame of reference to compare these to.This set of three offers a nice assortment of neutral shades to complement a variety of outfits. The socks feel very well-made, and I have to to admit that they're extremely soft and comfortable. If you pull them up they go just below the knee, though you can also bunch them up for a slouchy, relaxed look. They feel cozy and warm while looking great.They're also versatile for different activities. Sometimes I'll follow up my Pilates with weights or some MMA-style workouts in my VR headset, and will usually wear cross-trainers for that. These socks still work well and look good with shoes over top... though the grippy soles make the shoes a bit harder to slip on.The main downside is that they're not quite snug enough. While putting them on feels like stepping into a wonderful dream, they don't hug my feet the way some sports socks do. And because of that, the grippy surface on the bottom tends to shift sometimes, reducing the traction they're supposed to provide.All in all, these are extremely comfy, stylish socks for a variety of activities, but if you're super serious about Pilates or other activities that require a firm footing... based on my experience you might want something a bit more snug and supportive.
authors_reviews.author: DL

authors_reviews.title: AMAZING for pilates
authors_reviews.text: I love these socks!! Nice grips for pilates and the height is perfect, they are so cute the way they scrunch. Will definitely be buying more.
authors_reviews.author: Jaime
